keyFindings.description: Lines 74, 83 still reference ENVOY_REGISTRY_DIR which was removed in this PR. Deployers following docs will try to set non-existent config.
Line 108 still documents listener.registryDir as required config, but the field was removed from ListenerConfig interface.
listenerDeps.sessions uses concrete *SessionRegistry instead of SessionLookup interface. Pragmatic for List() needed by /v1/sessions, acceptable trade-off.
Race condition fix is correct — sseWriter/sseConn now set before endpoint event write.
